title: MTW's Pirates CIT Pack
description: No more landlubber loot — arm yerself like a proper scourge of the seas in a friendly vanilla style! 🏴‍☠️
body:
# About 🔍 ### 🏴‍☠️ Ahoy lads! 🏴‍☠️ I’m working on a pirate mod, so I’ve put together this resource pack featuring some of the textures i’ve prepared. In it you’ll find cutlasses, a variety of flintlock pistols, muskets and harpoons, and some fancy pirate headwear! (｡･∀･)ﾉﾞ

### ⚠️ IMPORTANT ⚠️ **Thanks to new features introduced in Minecraft 1.21.5, you can now use this resource pack in full vanilla for that version — and future ones too!** On the other hand, if you're playing on an earlier version (1.20 to 1.21), you'll need to install one of the following mods: - **CIT Resewn Fabric** - **CIT Resewn Forge** **P.S:** Inside the resource pack folder, I’ve included a .txt file with all the items you can get and how to get them! # Features 📚 As mentioned before, this resource pack lets ye turn those dull ol' bows and swords into trusty flintlock pistols, muskets and finely sharpened cutlasses.
🏝️ Let's take a quick look at what you can find and how to get it!




🎩 Hats variants:

🪙 Flintlock pistols variants:



☠️ Muskets variants:



🦈 Harpoons variants:



📋 Items list: Here's the list of items if you want to copy and paste them!
(especially if you're going for the dark oak netherite flintlock pistol lol)
Cutlasses - **📝 Renaming any Sword:** - Wooden Cutlass - Stone Cutlass - Iron Cutlass - Golden Cutlass - Diamond Cutlass - Netherite Cutlass
Hats - **📝 Renaming a Carved Pumpkin:** - **CAPTAIN HATS** - Black Captain Hat - Blue Captain Hat - Brown Captain Hat - Cyan Captain Hat - Gray Captain Hat - Green Captain Hat - Light Blue Captain Hat - Light Gray Captain Hat - Lime Captain Hat - Magenta Captain Hat - Orange Captain Hat - Pink Captain Hat - Purple Captain Hat - Red Captain Hat - White Captain Hat - Yellow Captain Hat - **TRICORNS** - Black Tricorn - Blue Tricorn - Brown Tricorn - Cyan Tricorn - Gray Tricorn - Green Tricorn - Light Blue Tricorn - Light Gray Tricorn - Lime Tricorn - Magenta Tricorn - Orange Tricorn - Pink Tricorn - Purple Tricorn - Red Tricorn - White Tricorn - Yellow Tricorn - **STRAW HAT** - Straw Hat
Flintlock Pistols - **📝 Renaming a Bow:** - **FLINTLOCK PISTOL** - Flintlock Pistol - Acacia Flintlock Pistol - Bamboo Flintlock Pistol - Birch Flintlock Pistol - Cherry Flintlock Pistol - Crimson Flintlock Pistol - Dark Oak Flintlock Pistol - Jungle Flintlock Pistol - Mangrove Flintlock Pistol - Pale Flintlock Pistol - Spruce Flintlock Pistol - Warped Flintlock Pistol - **GOLDEN FLINTLOCK PISTOL** - Golden Flintlock Pistol - Acacia Golden Flintlock Pistol - Bamboo Golden Flintlock Pistol - Birch Golden Flintlock Pistol - Cherry Golden Flintlock Pistol - Crimson Golden Flintlock Pistol - Dark Oak Golden Flintlock Pistol - Jungle Golden Flintlock Pistol - Mangrove Golden Flintlock Pistol - Pale Golden Flintlock Pistol - Spruce Golden Flintlock Pistol - Warped Golden Flintlock Pistol - **DIAMOND FLINTLOCK PISTOL** - Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Acacia Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Bamboo Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Birch Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Cherry Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Crimson Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Dark Oak Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Jungle Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Mangrove Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Pale Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Spruce Diamond Flintlock Pistol - Warped Diamond Flintlock Pistol - **NETHERITE FLINTLOCK PISTOL** - Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Acacia Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Bamboo Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Birch Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Cherry Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Crimson Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Dark Oak Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Jungle Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Mangrove Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Pale Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Spruce Netherite Flintlock Pistol - Warped Netherite Flintlock Pistol
Muskets - **📝 Renaming a Crossbow:** - **MUSKET** - Musket - Acacia Musket - Bamboo Musket - Birch Musket - Cherry Musket - Crimson Musket - Dark Oak Musket - Jungle Musket - Mangrove Musket - Pale Musket - Spruce Musket - Warped Musket - **GOLDEN MUSKET** - Golden Musket - Acacia Golden Musket - Bamboo Golden Musket - Birch Golden Musket - Cherry Golden Musket - Crimson Golden Musket - Dark Oak Golden Musket - Jungle Golden Musket - Mangrove Golden Musket - Pale Golden Musket - Spruce Golden Musket - Warped Golden Musket - **DIAMOND MUSKET** - Diamond Musket - Acacia Diamond Musket - Bamboo Diamond Musket - Birch Diamond Musket - Cherry Diamond Musket - Crimson Diamond Musket - Dark Oak Diamond Musket - Jungle Diamond Musket - Mangrove Diamond Musket - Pale Diamond Musket - Spruce Diamond Musket - Warped Diamond Musket - **NETHERITE MUSKET** - Netherite Musket - Acacia Netherite Musket - Bamboo Netherite Musket - Birch Netherite Musket - Cherry Netherite Musket - Crimson Netherite Musket - Dark Oak Netherite Musket - Jungle Netherite Musket - Mangrove Netherite Musket - Pale Netherite Musket - Spruce Netherite Musket - Warped Netherite Musket
Harpoons - **📝 Renaming a Trident:** - **HARPOON** - Harpoon - Acacia Harpoon - Bamboo Harpoon - Birch Harpoon - Cherry Harpoon - Crimson Harpoon - Dark Oak Harpoon - Jungle Harpoon - Mangrove Harpoon - Pale Harpoon - Spruce Harpoon - Warped Harpoon - **GOLDEN HARPOON** - Golden Harpoon - Acacia Golden Harpoon - Bamboo Golden Harpoon - Birch Golden Harpoon - Cherry Golden Harpoon - Crimson Golden Harpoon - Dark Oak Golden Harpoon - Jungle Golden Harpoon - Mangrove Golden Harpoon - Pale Golden Harpoon - Spruce Golden Harpoon - Warped Golden Harpoon - **DIAMOND HARPOON** - Diamond Harpoon - Acacia Diamond Harpoon - Bamboo Diamond Harpoon - Birch Diamond Harpoon - Cherry Diamond Harpoon - Crimson Diamond Harpoon - Dark Oak Diamond Harpoon - Jungle Diamond Harpoon - Mangrove Diamond Harpoon - Pale Diamond Harpoon - Spruce Diamond Harpoon - Warped Diamond Harpoon - **NETHERITE HARPOON** - Netherite Harpoon - Acacia Netherite Harpoon - Bamboo Netherite Harpoon - Birch Netherite Harpoon - Cherry Netherite Harpoon - Crimson Netherite Harpoon - Dark Oak Netherite Harpoon - Jungle Netherite Harpoon - Mangrove Netherite Harpoon - Pale Netherite Harpoon - Spruce Netherite Harpoon - Warped Netherite Harpoon

🌊🏴‍☠️🌊

With this entire arsenal straight from Davy Jones’ locker, ye be more than ready to set sail on a grand adventure beyond the seven seas!




Feel free to use this however you like as long as you give me credit! ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)
except for anything lowkey illegal lol
